name: Aduki and Squash Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepre beans according to package directions.
2. Remove seeds from squash, remove peel and cut flesh into 1-inch cubes.
3. Place squash and remaining ingredients (except miso) in a large soup kettle.
4. Bring to a boil, reduce heat and simmer until vegetables are tender, about one hour.
5. In a small bowl, mix miso and 1/4 cup broth until miso is dissolved.
6. Stir miso mixture into soup. Do not boil soup after adding miso.
7. Serve immediately.
